item.title: Sensex and Nifty Retreat as Banking Sector Leads Declines; Mixed Sectoral Trends Mark Market Session
item.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a sharp correction on 6 March 2026, with the Sensex plunging 1.37% and the Nifty 50 declining 1.27%, dragged down predominantly by heavy losses in the banking sector and mega-cap stocks. Market breadth remained weak as most sectors and indices closed in the red, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid mixed global cues and subdued domestic triggers. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Sees Mild Correction Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a modest decline of 0.22% today, extending a recent downtrend that has seen the index fall by 3.07% over the past five trading sessions. Despite pockets of strong performance, the overall market breadth remains weak, signalling cautious investor sentiment amid mixed sectoral trends and shifting technical outlooks. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Pressure as BSE MIDCAP 150 Declines Amid Mixed Stock Sentiment
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, has experienced a notable decline over recent sessions, reflecting a cautious investor sentiment amid uneven sectoral contributions and a broad market pullback. The index fell by 0.67% on the day and has contracted by 3.12% over the past five trading days, signalling a period of consolidation after recent gains. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Mixed Performance Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable pressure in recent sessions, declining by 1.16% on the day and shedding 2.96% over the past five trading days. Despite this broad weakness, select heavyweight stocks have shown resilience, with defensive sectors gaining favour amid a cautious market environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.140.65
item.description: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd’s share price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.140.65 on 6 Mar 2026, marking a significant drop amid broader market weakness and company-specific performance concerns. The stock underperformed its sector and key benchmarks, reflecting ongoing challenges in maintaining momentum. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: BLS E-Services Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 130.4
item.description: BLS E-Services Ltd, a player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.130.4 today, marking a significant decline amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. The stock's fall reflects ongoing challenges in maintaining momentum despite positive sales growth and consistent quarterly results. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Protean eGov Technologies Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low at Rs.540
item.description: Protean eGov Technologies Ltd’s share price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.540 today, marking a significant downturn amid broader market weakness and persistent underperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd Hits 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.103.65 on 6 Mar 2026, marking a significant drop amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. The stock has been on a downward trajectory, reflecting a combination of subdued growth metrics and reduced institutional participation. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: AWL Agri Business Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: AWL Agri Business Ltd has touched a new 52-week and all-time low price of Rs.176.95 today, marking a significant downturn for the edible oil sector company. The stock has been on a persistent downward trajectory, reflecting a series of financial and market pressures that have weighed on its performance over the past year. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Heranba Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.192.75
item.description: Heranba Industries Ltd’s shares touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.192.75 today, marking a significant decline amid persistent downward pressure. This new low reflects ongoing challenges faced by the company within the Pesticides & Agrochemicals sector, as it continues to underperform relative to broader market indices and sector peers. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: RPSG Ventures Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: RPSG Ventures Ltd has declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.631.9, marking a significant downturn for the stock amid broader market weakness and company-specific performance factors. The stock has underperformed its sector and the broader market over the past year, reflecting a challenging period for the commercial services and supplies company. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Poddar Pigments Ltd. Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.221
item.description: Poddar Pigments Ltd., a player in the Dyes and Pigments sector, has touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.221 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid a broader market downturn and persistent underperformance relative to benchmarks and peers. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: SEPC Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.6.63 Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: SEPC Ltd, a player in the construction sector, recorded a new 52-week low of Rs.6.63 today, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing downward trajectory. The stock has underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting a series of challenges that have weighed on its valuation and investor sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: V-Mart Retail Ltd. Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.515
item.description: V-Mart Retail Ltd., a key player in the diversified retail sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.515 today, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting ongoing concerns about its financial metrics and market positioning. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Unison Metals Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.0.92
item.description: Unison Metals Ltd, a player in the Iron & Steel Products sector, has reached a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.0.92 today, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downward trend over the past week. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: SGL Resources Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.2.14
item.description: SGL Resources Ltd, a player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.2.14 today, marking a significant decline in its share price amid persistent underperformance and deteriorating financial metrics. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Lesha Industries Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.0.67
item.description: Lesha Industries Ltd has declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.0.67, marking a significant drop in its share price amid subdued financial performance and challenging market conditions. The stock’s fall contrasts sharply with the broader market trends, reflecting ongoing concerns about the company’s fundamentals and valuation. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Lodha Developers Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 6 Mar 2026
item.description: Lodha Developers Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of ₹886.5, reflecting a 3.24% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Agio Paper & Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.3.87
item.description: Agio Paper & Industries Ltd has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.3.87 today, marking a significant decline amid a broader market downturn. The stock has underperformed its sector and key benchmarks, reflecting ongoing concerns about its financial health and market position. Time: 2 hours ago
